DAX: Provisioned Cloud PCs = CALCULATE([Total Cloud PCs], DimCloudPC[Status] = "Provisioned")
Provisioning Success Rate = DIVIDE([Provisioned Cloud PCs], [Total Cloud PCs])
Active Users 7D = CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(FactCloudPCUsage[UserKey]), FactCloudPCUsage[UsageHours] > 0, DATESINPERIOD(DimDate[Date], MAX(DimDate[Date]), -7, DAY))
Stale Cloud PCs 45D = CALCULATE([Total Cloud PCs], DimCloudPC[DaysSinceLastLogin] > 45)
Cost per Active User = DIVIDE([Total Monthly Cost], [Active Users 7D])
